name: Nathan East
description: American jazz, R&B and rock bassist, guitarist and singer (born 1955)
abstract: Nathan Harrell East (born December 8, 1955) is an American jazz, R&B, and rock bass guitarist and vocalist. With more than 2,000 recordings, East is one of the most recorded bass players in the history of music.

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: Interviewer mentions: 'Probably Nathan East was on bass.' Interviewee does not confirm this specific personnel detail nor discuss a personal or professional relationship with Nathan East.

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Soloff
about_quotes.evidence: The bass player was Nathan East. The drummer was Narada Michael Walden... And it was an astounding rhythm section.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Soloff interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000
